name: Brandwatch
highlight_text: Best for social media listening and community management
description:
What Brandwatch Does

Brandwatch is a social listening and customer intelligence platform that has also built a social media suite designed primarily for enterprise-level businesses. It caters to various aspects of social media marketing, from content creation and scheduling to social listening, audience intelligence, and influencer marketing.

Key Features

  • Manage all your organic and paid content from a centralized, intuitive calendar interface.
  • Define user roles and approval flows 
  • Access a centralized digital asset library to store and manage all your content assets.
  • Integrate with third-party storage tools for seamless content management.
  • Schedule, edit, preview, and publish social media posts and campaigns across multiple platforms.
  • Utilize customizable pricing options to select the features your team requires.
  • Design and manage campaigns with built-in templates and detailed performance metrics.
  • Seamlessly integrate Brandwatch with your Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system for a holistic view of customer interactions and engagement.
  • Foster collaboration among team members through integrated approval flows and content review processes.

Benefits of Brandwatch

  • Ensure consistent, high-quality, and on-brand content across campaigns and teams.
  • Maintain brand consistency by ensuring your social media posts utilize pre-approved assets.
  • Ensure quality control and consistent messaging across your social media campaigns.

Pricing

They offer custom pricing

Pros

✅Integrates very well with CRMs and customer engagement tools

✅Customer support is very responsive and active

Cons

❌Too expensive for small businesses

❌No AI integration into the platform for automating scheduling
